title: Alien Invasion: Rise of the Phoenix
original_title: Alien Invasion : Rise of the Phoenix
overview: An asteroid shower lands in a remote section of the Grand Canyon and begins to spread mysterious pods. Meanwhile, scientists on a space station that has been hit by the same asteroid shower, discover that a pod has mutated into a creature and is threatening the ship. Now the scientists and a team on Earth must learn to defeat this alien force, fighting fire with fire, fighting stone with stone.
